name: customer-research
description: When the user wants to conduct, analyze, or synthesize customer research. Use when the user mentions "customer research," "ICP research," "talk to customers," "analyze transcripts," "customer interviews," "survey analysis," "support ticket analysis," "voice of customer," "VOC," "build personas," "customer personas," "jobs to be done," "JTBD," "what do customers say," "what are customers struggling with," "Reddit mining," "G2 reviews," "review mining," "digital watering holes," "community researc
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 这是个客户研究助手，能帮你分析访谈、问卷和社区评论等反馈，挖掘客户痛点与真实声音，快速构建用户画像，适合需要深度洞察目标群体的场景。
